positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a glowing mountain range silhouette at dawn, rendered in a geometric, Art Deco-meets-Nature style. The foreground features abstracted jungle foliage and stylized mountain peaks, creating strong contrast against a gradient sky of deep sapphire blue, soft lavender, and burning orange. Clean vector lines are paramount, emphasizing negative space and high contrast. The composition is centered and perfectly symmetrical, making it ideal for placement on chest area of a t-shirt. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of electric blue, gold, emerald green, and charcoal black. Graphic design quality, suitable for screen printing, high detail, 4K resolution.
negative: blurry, deformed, text, logo, watermark, signature, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, low resolution, photorealistic, 3d render, messy, gradient background, messy edges
